notes: This file declares active intake channel constraints used by Admission routing.
It does not confer authority on evidence, analysis, or outcomes.
Routing is fail-closed if required limits are missing or ambiguous.
Compressed evidence is admissible only if decompression is deterministic and explicitly declared.
Compression does not change routing eligibility; total decompressed size may still exceed limits.
If compression is used while deterministic decompression is not declared, routing MUST hard halt.

notes_for_operators: DIRECT_TO_BEAGLE is permitted only when evidence_set_count == 1 and all declared limits are satisfied.
Multi-file evidence sets MUST route to LEAFCUTTERANT_STAGING regardless of total byte size.
If evidence exceeds channel limits, Admission MUST route to LEAFCUTTERANT_STAGING.
If compression is used, determinism MUST be explicitly declared and validated.
If the true channel limits change, update this file explicitly—do not infer or override at runtime.
